bidding.note: Clean 1D-2H Soloway: N has solid AKJ876 H, 19 HCP, 7 controls. Opener raises, RKCB, sound 6H.
1D-2S with AKQT952 S, 4 controls; opener raises, RKCB to sound 6S.
Genuine 1C-2S jump (6 controls) but 2N overcall and X muddy it; stops in 4S with slam cold (DD13).
Solid-heart 1D-2H, 6 controls; long cue/RKCB tail to 6H, makes 12.
1C-2S, 6 controls, void D; long RKCB+cue tail to 6S making 13.
1D-2S, 5 controls; settles in 5D minor game opposite minimum after diamond fit found.
1D-2H, 5 controls; 2N then heart fit, RKCB, long tail to 6H makes 12.
1C-2D, solid diamonds, 6 controls; long cue/RKCB tail reaches 6D.
1H-2S Soloway over a major; 21 HCP, 5 controls; long cue tail, RKCB to 6H.
1D-2H, 6 controls, sound RKCB sequence, but 6H fails on bad breaks (DD down both); 5H safer.
N has a 7-control monster on 1H-2S, but partnership stops in 4S; opener's min and misfit defend it.
1C-2D, 7 controls; club fit, cue/raise sequence to 6C without Blackwood, makes 12.
1D-2S, void H, 4 controls; RKCB correctly stops in 5S off a keycard, makes 13.
Clean 1C-2H, solid hearts, 6 controls; opener raises, RKCB to sound 6H.
1D-2H, solid AKQJ93 H, 4 controls; opener's 3N passed, but 4H is the natural home for a solid suit.
1H-2S, 5 controls; long wandering auction overreaches to 7H, which DD says is down both. 6H is the limit.
1H-2S, 6 controls; RKCB shows two keycards missing, correctly stops 5H, makes 12.
Clean 1C-2H, 5 controls; opener raises, RKCB to sound 6H making 13.
1C-2H, 5 controls; club fit explored then quantitative 4N-6N NT slam, makes 12.
1D-2S, 7 controls, void D; 3N then quantitative 4N-6N, makes 12.
Genuine 1H-2S (6 controls) but 2N overcall pushes them to 3N then 4S; slam values (DD13) left unexplored.
1D-2H, 6 controls; 4C-X competition muddies it, lands in 5D game; 5H is the other strain.
1D-2S, 7 controls; 2N then 3N and quantitative leap to 6N, makes 12.
1C-2D, 6 controls; long cue/RKCB tail reaches 6D making 12.
Clean 1D-2S, 5 controls; opener raises, RKCB to sound 6S making 12.
1D-2H, 5 controls; opener's 2S then heart fit, RKCB to 6H making 13.
1C-2H, 6 controls; club fit, cue sequence to 6C making 12.
1C-2H, 6 controls, void in opener's clubs; quantitative 4N-6N lands in failing NT slam (DD down both); 6H better.
N has only 3 controls (AK hearts) — short of Soloway's 4-control requirement; wandering auction stops in 4N.
1C-2H, solid hearts, 5 controls; 30 combined so correctly settles in 4H, makes 12.
1C-2S, 6 controls; opener cuebids 4H then signs off 4S as combined values fall short, makes 12.
1C-2H, solid hearts, 7 controls; very long RKCB+kings tail to 6H making 12.
1C-2S, 5 controls; 3D overcall, opener jumps 4S, RKCB to sound 6S making 13.
1C-2H, 6 controls; RKCB plus king-ask, reaches 6H making 13.
1C-2H, 7 controls; long cue/RKCB tail reaches 6H making 12.
1D-2H, 4 controls; heart fit, settles in 4H as combined values fall short of slam, makes 11.
1C-2S, 5 controls; opener leaps 4S to 6S without a control-check; 6S is down on DD, 4S safer.
1D-2S, 6 controls; 3C interference, opener jumps to 4S then 6S, makes 12.
1C-2S, 5 controls; X interference, RKCB to grand 7C which makes 13.
1C-2S, 4 controls; quantitative leap 3N-6N badly overreaches — DD says down, result down four. 3N is the limit.
1C-2S, 4 controls; RKCB to 6S which DD says is down one; 5S the safer stop on a flat slam try.
1D-2S, 7 controls; spade fit then 4N-5C-6N, sound NT slam (DD13).
1C-2D, 6 controls; quantitative 4N-6N reaches a NT slam DD says is down one; 3N is the practical stop.
1D-2H, 8 controls (all four aces); long RKCB+king tail to grand 7H, makes 13.
1C-2D, solid diamonds, 5 controls; long cue/RKCB tail reaches 6C making 12.
1C-2D, 7 controls; quantitative 4N passed by opener; with 32 combined HCP 6N was there (DD12).
1D-2H Soloway: N has AKQ974 H, 19 HCP, 4 controls. 2N waiting, RKCB, lands sound 6H.
1D-2H Soloway: AQJ854 H + 5D, 6 controls. Stops 4H; slam cold (DD 12) opposite weak S, but S has nothing to drive.
1C-2H Soloway: AKQ953 H, 19 HCP, 4 controls. 2N waiting, RKCB, reaches sound 6H.
1C-2D Soloway: AKJ82 D, 19 HCP, 4 controls. 2N-3N then 6N; combined 32 HCP, sound NT slam.
1D-2H Soloway: AKJT53 H, 22 HCP, 5 controls. 2N waiting, RKCB, easy 6H making 7 on power.
1C-2D Soloway: AKQJ84 D, 19 HCP. Long cue/RKCB sequence to 7N; grand sound on combined power but a control-showing tail.
1C-2D Soloway: AKJ96 D, 19 HCP. 2N-3N then 4N natural quant; partner passes. Stops short, 4N makes 5 (DD 12).
1D-2S Soloway: KQJ863 S, 17 HCP, 4 controls. 2N waiting, 3S, RKCB, lands 6S.
1H-2S Soloway: AKQ42 S, 19 HCP. 3S raise, RKCB, signs off 6H in opener's suit; sound slam.
1C-2H Soloway: AKQJ53 H, 23 HCP, 6 controls. 2N-3H-4H then 5N grand-try, settles 6H.
1D-2S Soloway: AKJT7542 S solid, 19 HCP. 3C tail, cues, RKCB to cold 7S; long but sound grand.
1D-2S Soloway: KQJT72 S, 18 HCP. 3D, 3S, RKCB finds missing keycard, stops 5S; sound.
1D-2S Soloway: AKJT54 S, 18 HCP. 2N-3S-3N; settles 3N making 13 (DD). Misses cold slam but partner min.
1D-2S Soloway: AKJT63 S, 18 HCP. RKCB then long cue exchange to 6S; sound slam, wordy tail.
1C-2S Soloway: AKQJ62 S, 23 HCP. 3C tail, RKCB, cue to 6N; sound on combined 37, longish.
1D-2H Soloway: AKQ93 H + 4D, 17 HCP. Wandering 2N-3D-4D-4H-5D-6N; 6N goes down DD. Pushy to slam off values.
1C-2S Soloway over 2N overcall: AKQJ73 S, 22 HCP. 4S, RKCB, jumps to cold 7S; sound grand.
1C-2D Soloway: AKJT6 D, 19 HCP. 2H, then 5N pick-a-slam jump; reaches 6N making 7. Sound but abrupt.
1C-2D Soloway: KQJ986 D, 18 HCP. 2N-3S-3N; settles 3N making 12 DD. Slam thin opposite min, defensible stop.
1C-2S Soloway: AKJT43 S, 17 HCP. 3S raise, RKCB, lands sound 6S.
1D-2S Soloway: AKQ97 S, 21 HCP. 2N, 3C/3D new suits, RKCB to 6N; sound, exploratory tail.
1C-2S Soloway: AKQJ85 S, 17 HCP. 3D tail, 3S, RKCB, lands 6S.
1C-2H Soloway: AKQJ72 H, 20 HCP. 3C-3H-3N then 6N jump; sound on 34 combined, abrupt leap.
1H-2S Soloway: AQJT76 S, 19 HCP. 3H tail, 3S, 3N, 4N quant to 6N; sound NT slam.
1C-2S Soloway: KQJ74 S, 17 HCP. 3C-3H then 3N over X; settles game making 12. Slam values present, stops low.
1H-2S Soloway: AKQJ63 S, 17 HCP. 2N, 3H, 4C/4D with competitive X/XX; settles 4H. Noisy but sound game.
1C-2D Soloway over 2H overcall: AQJ832 D, 17 HCP. 3N/4H then RKCB chain to 6D; sound slam, long tail.
1C-2S Soloway: AKJT2 S, 17 HCP. 3C tail, 3D, RKCB to 6C; sound minor slam.
1H-2S Soloway: AKQT32 S, 21 HCP. 2N, 3S, 4S, RKCB to 6N; sound on combined 33.
1D-2H Soloway: AKQT9 H + 4D, 18 HCP. 3D raise, 4C, 5D; settles 5D making 12. Slam thin off a key, defensible.
1C-2D Soloway: AKQJT8 D solid, 18 HCP. 2N-3N then 6N jump; making 6 (DD 12). Sound but abrupt slam leap.
1D-2H Soloway: AKQJ852 H solid, 17 HCP, 5 controls. 2N waiting, RKCB, lands 6H.
1D-2H Soloway: AKQJ87 H, 17 HCP. 3D, 3H, RKCB to 6H; DD 11 (down). Reasonable slam, falls on a bad break.
1D-2H Soloway: AKJT94 H, 18 HCP. 2N-3H-3S-3N; settles 3N making 11. Defensible stop opposite min S.
1H-2S Soloway: AKQJT4 S solid, 17 HCP. 3C tail, 3S, RKCB, lands 6S.
1D-2H Soloway: AKQT654 H, 17 HCP. RKCB then 5N grand-try, settles cold 6H making 7; longish tail.
1H-2S Soloway: AKQJT74 S solid, 19 HCP. 2N-3S-3N then 4N quant; partner passes, makes 11. Defensible stop.
1D-2H Soloway: AKQJ2 H + 4D, 17 HCP. 3D raise, 4D, RKCB to 6D over competitive X; sound minor slam.
1H-2S Soloway: AKQJ52 S, 18 HCP. 2N-3S-3N; settles 3N making 11. Defensible stop opposite min.
1D-2H Soloway: AKQJ53 H, 18 HCP. 3D, 3H, RKCB, lands sound 6H.
1C-2H Soloway: AKQJ53 H + 6D, 17 HCP. 3C tail, RKCB, 5S/6D cue tail to 6H; sound slam.
1D-2S Soloway over 3C: AQJ63 S, 17 HCP. 3N-4C-4N-5D settles 5D making 13. Minor-slam values, stops in 5.
1D-2S Soloway: AKQ854 S, 17 HCP. 2N, 3S, RKCB finds missing keycard, stops 5S; sound.
1C-2S Soloway: AKJT82 S, 17 HCP. 3D tail, 3S, RKCB then 5N/6C grand-try, settles 6S; sound, long tail.
1D-2S Soloway: AKQJ43 S, 18 HCP. 3D tail, RKCB over X, 5N/6C/6D grand chain to cold 7S; sound, long.
1C-2H Soloway: AKQ75 H, 17 HCP. 2S, 3D, 4H, RKCB to 6H; DD 11 (down). Reasonable slam on a bad break.
1D-2H Soloway: AKJT862 H, 17 HCP, 4 controls. 3H raise, RKCB, lands sound 6H.
1C-2S textbook strong JS (7 controls, AKJT72). But 3N stops with 32 combined HCP and a spade fit; 6N/6S cold (12 DD tricks).
1D-2H clean JS (solid AKQ heart suit, 5 controls). 3D-3H, then RKCB tail to 6H. Sound slam; long Blackwood sequence worth a note.
1C-2H solid-suit JS (AKQT85, 7 controls). 2N-3H, RKCB with 5N king-ask to 6H. Sound; long control-showing tail.
1D-2H clean JS (AKQ975, 7 controls). Opener 2N then raises hearts; 4H reached. Convention on clear display.
1D-2S textbook JS (AKQJ32, 6 controls). RKCB to 6H then 6S correction by responder. Sound 6S; 6N/6S both make.
1H-2S clean JS (AKQJ86, 7 controls). 2N-3S-3N then 4N quant; passed in 4N. 6S/6N cold (12 DD); stops short of slam.
1C-2H solid-suit JS (AKQ854, 7 controls). RKCB tail (5D-5S-6C) to 6H, makes 7. Sound slam, long auction.
1C-2D JS (AKJT2, 5 controls, 14 HCP - light). 2H then jump 5N (grand-slam force); 6N. Sound but 2D suit/values thin for Soloway; 5N leap muddy.
1C-2D strong JS (AKJ765, 7 controls). 3C-3D, RKCB to 6N. Sound slam; control tail worth a sentence.
1C-2H JS over 2N overcall (AQJ73, 6 controls). Cuebid 4C, RKCB to 6H. Sound slam despite interference; long tail.
1D-2H solid-suit JS (AKQJT7, 6 controls). 2N-3H, RKCB to 6H. Sound; Blackwood tail.
1D-2S solid JS (AKQJ876, 6 controls). 2N-3S, RKCB to 6H then 6S correction. Sound slam, long tail.
1C-2S strong JS (KQJ64, 7 controls). 3C-3D-4C then RKCB to 6N. Sound slam; wandering control sequence.
1D-2H clean JS (KQJT5, 6 controls). 2N-3C-3D-3S-3N descriptive sequence to 3N. Sound; no slam (no fit, flat values).
1C-2S clean JS (AKQJ832, 7 controls). 3C-3S-4S raise, RKCB to 6S. Sound slam, convention on display.
1C-2D strong JS (AKJ943, 7 controls). 2N-3D-3H, RKCB to 6N. Sound slam; long tail.
1C-2D solid JS (AKQJT9, 6 controls). 3C-3S over X, RKCB to 6C. Sound slam through interference; long tail.
1D-2S clean JS (AKQT98, 6 controls). 3D-3S, RKCB with 5N king-ask to 6S. Sound slam; long tail.
1D-2S strong JS (AKQ74, 6 controls). 3D-4D-5D-6D natural diamond raise to slam, makes 7. Sound 6D; 6N also makes.
1C-2H solid JS (AKQT65, 7 controls). RKCB tail to 7H but grand fails (DD 12, down both). Aggressive grand on values; 6H the safe call.
1C-2H solid JS (AKQJ43, 6 controls). 2S then 3H, RKCB to 6H makes 7. Clean Soloway slam auction.
1D-2S solid JS (AKQJT5, 5 controls). Long sequence to 7N but grand fails (DD 12, down both). Overbid to grand; small slam right.
1C-2S strong JS (AKQJT2, 6 controls). 3C-3S-4C-4S then RKCB to 6S. Sound slam; wandering control tail.
1C-2H solid JS (AKQJ53, 7 controls). 3C-3H-3S then RKCB, signs off 5C (missing keycard). Sound stop short; 5H also playable.
1D-2H JS (AKQ86, 7 controls), 22 HCP opener. 2S-3D-3H, RKCB to 7H grand, makes. Sound grand; long tail.
1C-2D strong JS (AKQ72, 6 controls). 2N-3N then leap to 6N on raw values, makes. Sound result but 3N-6N jump skips slam exploration.
1D-2H clean JS (AKQJ82, 7 controls). 3D-3H-3S-4H descriptive to game. Sound stop (minimum opener, no slam). Convention on display.
1D-2S strong JS (AKQ754, 6 controls). 3D-3S-4D, RKCB to 6D. Sound slam; long auction.
1C-2H solid JS (AKQJ642, 7 controls). 3C-3H, RKCB to 6N. Sound slam; Blackwood tail.
1D-2S strong JS (AKQT972, 7 controls). 3D-3S then 5H/6C splinter-cue sequence to 6S, makes 7. Sound slam; unusual jumps.
1D-2S clean JS (AQJT52, 5 controls). 3D-3S-3N descriptive to 3N, makes 4 (DD 12). Stops short of cold slam; flat-ish but values invite more.
1D-2S strong JS (AKQJ54, 6 controls). 3D-3S, RKCB to 6S. Sound slam; Blackwood tail.
1C-2H clean JS (AKQJT9, 6 controls). 3C-3H-4H simple raise to game. Minimum opener stops in game. Convention on display.
1D-2S JS (AKQ92, 6 controls). 2N-3H-3N then 4N-6D. 6D makes only 11 (down both DD); 6N/5D safer. Borderline slam push.
1C-2S strong JS (AKQ63, 7 controls). 3S raise then long cuebid/RKCB sequence to 6S. Sound slam; very long control auction.
1C-2D JS (AKQ82, 6 controls). 2H then leap 5N grand-force to 6N. Sound result but 5N jump skips orderly slam exploration.
1C-2S strong JS (AKQJ2, 6 controls). Long 3C-3D-4C-4D-RKCB to 6C; makes only 10 (down both DD). Aggressive slam push.
1H-2S clean JS (AQJT62, 6 controls). 2N-3S, RKCB then signs off 5S (off a keycard). Sound stop; 6S makes (DD 13) but missing keycard found.
1D-2H solid JS (AKQJ874, 7 controls). 3D-3H then RKCB/king-ask to 7H grand, makes. Sound grand; long tail.
1C-2H strong JS (AKQJ82, 6 controls). 3C-3H, RKCB to 6H. Sound slam; Blackwood tail.
1D-2H solid JS (AKQT75, 6 controls). 3D-3H-3N then leap 6N, makes 7. Sound result but 3N-6N jump skips slam exploration.
1D-2S strong JS (AKQJ43, 6 controls). 3D-3S-3N-4D-4S descriptive to game. Minimum opener stops sensibly. Convention on display.
1H-2S strong JS (AKQT8654, 7 controls). 3C-3S, RKCB to 6C then 7S grand, makes. Sound grand; long tail.
1C-2H strong JS (AKQ73, 6 controls). 2S-3C-4H, RKCB to 6H; makes only 11 (down both DD). Borderline slam push.
1D-2H solid JS (AKQT873, 6 controls). 2S-3H, RKCB with king-ask to 6H. Sound slam; long tail.
1H-2S strong JS (AKQT873, 7 controls) over 3C interference. 3S-4S, RKCB to 7S grand, makes. Sound grand; competitive tail.
1C-2H JS (AQJ652, 6 controls), 22 HCP opener. 3H raise, RKCB with king-ask to 7H grand, makes. Sound grand; long tail.
Solid 6-S Soloway 2S, RKCB+cue tail; 7S is a stretch on 32 HCP and DD goes down. 6S the sound stop.
Solid 6-H Soloway 2H, 7 controls; partnership cue/Blackwoods to a cold 7H. Sound, just a long control tail.
Strong 5-S Soloway 2S, opener bids 2N, responder shows D, settle 3N. Clean clarify-and-sign-off.
Soloway 2S with 5-S, opener rebids C, fit found, RKCB to 6C. Sound slam, control-show tail.
Solid 6-H Soloway, opener clarifies D then leaps 6D over 3N. Sound but 6D jump skips control-showing; 3N defensible.
Soloway 2S, opener 2N, responder 3C, RKCB to 6H heart fit. Sound slam reached.
Soloway 2H with strong hearts, opener raises 3H, RKCB to a cold 6H. Convention on clear display.
Soloway 2S over 1H, opener 3H, responder 3S, opener 3N. Clean clarify and stop in game.
Soloway 2H, opener 2N, responder 3S probe, settle 3N. Clean game stop, no slam values.
Soloway 2H over 1D, W overcalls 2N; opener supports H, RKCB to cold 7H. Sound grand through interference.
Soloway 2S, opener raises 3S, RKCB reveals missing key, stop 5S. Clean keycard discipline.
Soloway 2S, opener 3S then 4H cue, RKCB+cue to 6S. Sound slam, long cue tail.
Soloway 2D over 1C, opener 2H, responder shows solid D, RKCB to 6N. Sound minor-suit slam in NT.
Soloway 2H, opener 3D then 3H raise, RKCB to 6H. Sound slam, wrong-sided on DD but bidding clean.
Soloway 2H (solid 6-H), opener 2N then raises, RKCB to 6H but DD goes down; 5H the safe stop.
Soloway 2S, opener 3C, responder 3S, opener 3N; responder jumps 6N on combined 33. Sound quant leap, 3N also defensible.
Soloway 2D, opener 2N, responder shows D then H, settle 3N then 4N quant invite passed. Sound stop short of slam.
Soloway 2S (solid 7-S), opener 3D then 3S/4D, RKCB to cold 7S. Sound grand, long tail.
Soloway 2S, long muddy probe (3N-4C-4H-4S-4N-5C) to 6S that DD goes down; 3N a safer landing.
Soloway 2H, opener 3C, responder 3S then 4C/5S grand-try, settle 6C. Sound club slam.
Soloway 2H, opener 3C, responder 3S then 3N, RKCB stops in 5C off a key. Disciplined non-slam.
Soloway 2H, opener 3D then 3H raise, settle 4H. Clean clarify, no slam values, game stop.
Soloway 2S, opener 3S, RKCB+5N grand-ask to 6S. Sound slam, long tail.
Soloway 2S, opener 3D then 3S/4S, RKCB reveals missing key, stop 5S. Clean keycard discipline.
Soloway 2S (solid 6-S), RKCB+5N to 7N that DD goes down; 7S in the known fit safer than 7N.
Soloway 2S, opener 3S, RKCB+5N to 6S. Sound slam, control-show tail.
Soloway 2H, opener 3C, responder 3H, RKCB to 6H. Sound slam reached.
Soloway 2D over 1C, opener 3C raise, RKCB to 6C. Sound minor slam.
Soloway 2S over 1H, opener 2N, responder 3S then 3N, quant 4N to 6N. Sound NT slam on 32.
Soloway 2S, opener 2N then 3H/4D/4S, RKCB lands in 5D off a key. Sound stop but wandering; 3N alternative.
Soloway 2H, opener 2N then 3H raise, RKCB to 6H. Sound slam reached.
Soloway 2S over 1H, opener 3S raise, RKCB to a cold 6H. Convention on clear display.
Soloway 2H, opener 2N then 3H/4H, 5N grand-ask, settle 6H. Sound slam, 23-HCP opener.
Soloway 2H, opener 3C, responder 3H, RKCB+5N grand-ask to cold 7H. Sound grand, very long tail.
Soloway 2S, opener 3D then 3S, settle 3N. Clean clarify; 3N goes down on DD but auction sound.
Soloway 2H, opener 3C, responder 3H, 3S/4H cues, RKCB to 6H. Sound slam, cue+keycard tail.
Soloway 2H, opener 3C, responder 3H, 3S cue, settle 4H. Clean clarify, no slam, game stop.
Soloway 2H (solid 7-H), opener 3C, RKCB+5N grand-ask, settle 6H. Sound slam, long tail.
Soloway 2H, opener 3D then 3H/3N, quant 4N to 6N. Sound NT slam on combined 34.
Soloway 2S over 1C, opener 3S raise, RKCB reveals missing key, stop 5S. Clean keycard discipline.
Soloway 2S, opener 2N then 3S raise, RKCB to 6S. Sound spade slam.
Soloway 2D (7-D) over 1C, opener 2N then 3H, responder 3N, opener leaps 6D. Sound but 6D jump skips controls; 3N defensible.
Soloway 2H, opener 2N then 3H, RKCB+cue to 6H that DD goes down; 5H the safe landing.
Soloway 2S, opener 3D then 3S, RKCB to 6S. Sound spade slam reached.
Soloway 2S over 1C, W overcalls 2N; opener 3C then 3S/4S, settle game. Sound stop through interference.
Soloway 2H, opener 2N then 3H, RKCB to 6H. Sound heart slam.
Soloway 2H over 1D, W overcalls 2N; opener 3N then 4D/4H, settle 4H. Sound game stop through interference.
1D-2H strong JS, AQJT2 H + 4 controls; opener raises, RKCB to 6H. Slam is thin (DD down) — 5H defensible.
1D-2S solid spades + controls; 3S raise, 5H exclusion/control jump, 6S makes 12. Clean Soloway slam.
1D-2S AKQ92 strong suit + controls; raise, cue 4H, RKCB, 6S makes 13. Convention on clear display.
1C-2S AKQJ64 + 19, opener 2N then 3S support, RKCB+cue to 6S making 13. Sound.
1C-2H AKJT63 H + controls; opener rebids C, 3H, grand-try 5N, 6N makes 13. Strong Soloway.
1C-2D AQJT743 D + AK controls; long but coherent cue/RKCB sequence to 6N making 12. Tail is wordy.
1C-2H AKQT2 H + AK controls; cue tail then 6N making 13. Sound, minor wandering before NT slam.
1C-2H AQJT9875 H + AAK controls; 3D overcall, 3N, leap to 6H makes 13. Fast slam through interference.
1C-2S AKQJ98 + controls; 3D, 3S, RKCB+grand-ask to 7S making 13. Clean grand-slam Soloway.
1C-2D AKJT3 D + 19; opener leaps 5N grand-try, 6N. DD down (11) — 6N a touch aggressive but defensible.
1C-2D AKQ943 C + controls; opener 3N then cue/RKCB to 6C making 13. Long but coherent minor-slam tail.
1C-2H AKQJ982 solid H + controls; 2S, 3H, RKCB to 6H making 13. Clean Soloway slam.
1D-2S AKQJ93 + 17; opener 2N, 3S, RKCB to 6S making 12. Sound.
1D-2S AKQJ654 7-card + controls; 3C, 3S, RKCB+cue to 6S making 12. Clean.
1D-2H AKJT87 H + controls; 3D, 3H, RKCB to 6H making 12. Sound Soloway slam.
1C-2D AKQJT8 D + controls; competitive (X/5C) sequence to 6N making 13. Sound through interference.
1H-2S AKQT42 + controls; opener rebids 3H, RKCB, signs off 5H (missing key). Stopping in 5H is sound.
1C-2H AQJT63 H + controls; 3H raise, RKCB, signs off 5H missing a key. Disciplined stop — defensible.
1C-2D AKJT93 D + 21; opener 3C, 3D, RKCB to 6D making 12. Sound minor-suit Soloway slam.
1H-2S AQJT83 + controls; opener 2N, 3S, RKCB, stops 5S off a key. Stopping is right; 6S would fail.
1D-2S AKQJ94 + 19; opener raises, RKCB, signs off 5S missing a key. Disciplined stop — defensible.
1D-2S AKQJ62 + controls; 3D, 3S, RKCB+grand-ask 5N to 6S making 12. Clean.
1H-2S AKQT97 + controls; opener 3C, 3H, RKCB to 6H making 12. Sound Soloway slam.
1D-2H AKJ63 H + controls; 3H, cue 4D, opener signs off 4H. Combined values modest — stopping in game defensible.
1C-2H AKJ75 H + controls; opener 2N, 3S, 4C, RKCB to 6N making 12. Sound, slightly long.
1C-2H AKQJ73 H + AA controls; opener 3C, 3H, signs off 4H. With this much, slam-try defensible; stop is sound.
1H-2S AKQJ753 + controls; opener 3H, 3S, 3N, 4S. Misfit cools slam; 4S landing is sound, route wanders.
1D-2S AQJ92 + 19; auction wanders 2N/3C/3N then 4N-6D doubled, makes. Reaching 6D over 6N a strain-judgment call.
1D-2S KQJ965 + 20; opener 2N, 3S, 4S, RKCB to 6N making 11. Sound, NT-slam tail slightly long.
